rules.title: Ufw Force Stop Using Ufw-Init
rules.description: Detects attempts to force stop the ufw using ufw-init

rules.title: A Rule Has Been Deleted From The Windows Firewall Exception List
rules.condition_summary: selection exclusion filter excluding 1 of filter_main_* excluding 1 of filter_optional_*
rules.description: Detects when a single rules or all of the rules have been deleted from the Windows Defender Firewall

rules.title: Windows Firewall Settings Have Been Changed
rules.description: Detects activity when the settings of the Windows firewall have been changed

rules.title: The Windows Defender Firewall Service Failed To Load Group Policy
rules.description: Detects activity when The Windows Defender Firewall service failed to load Group Policy

rules.title: New Firewall Rule Added In Windows Firewall Exception List For Potential Suspicious Application
rules.condition_summary: selection exclusion filter excluding 1 of filter_main_*
rules.description: Detects the addition of a new rule to the Windows Firewall exception list for an application located in a potentially suspicious location.
